title: SSO Auth (OIDC/SAML + MFA at IdP)
notes: Replace email-allowlist gate in dashboard/auth.py + auth_gate.py. First IdP TBD (Google Workspace / Okta / Azure AD).

title: Risk Monitoring & Recommendations via AI Agents
notes: Background AI agent that periodically analyses findings, identifies patterns, surfaces recommended actions. DESIGN FORK PENDING: passive (recommends, you act) vs active (agent acts, you audit). Default to passive for v1.

title: MCP for Claude — LLM Outcomes
notes: Extend scripts/patronai_mcp_server.py beyond the 8 raw analytics tools to expose "outcomes": multi-step workflows, drafted action emails, PDF report generation, bulk-resolve commands that Claude Desktop can drive.

title: Terraform for Kubernetes install
notes: Helm chart + Terraform module. EKS first; GKE/AKS once #5 storage abstraction lands. Replaces single-EC2 Docker deploy.

title: Multi-cloud storage backend (GCS/Azure Blob/OCI)
notes: Abstract BlobIndexStore behind an interface ABC. S3 implementation exists; add GCS, Azure Blob, OCI Object Storage. Should land BEFORE #4 to make the K8s deploy cloud-agnostic.

title: EC2 Instance Profile (kill static AWS keys)
notes: Moot once K8s lands (service accounts replace this). Useful interim if v1 EC2 deploys continue past v2.0.

title: TLS / ALB+ACM in front of nginx
notes: Close 8501/3000 from public internet; ALB with ACM-managed cert; redirect 80→443.

title: Backend download proxy (hide AWS access key from URLs)
notes: ~150 LOC new endpoint. Customer URL becomes /agents/<token>?otp=<otp>; backend validates OTP and streams DMG from S3 server-side.

title: Streaming chat responses
notes: ~30 LOC in widget.py + openai_compat.py. Perceived 2-4× speedup. Real win on long answers.

notes: New notify/slack.py + notify/teams.py modules alongside notify/email.py. Same convention: send_alert(channel, events).

notes: SOC integration. FastAPI sidecar reading from rollup_reader. Token-auth.

notes: Migrate to g5.xlarge (~$1/h) for ~10× chat speedup over CPU.

title: LFM2.5-Instruct as default chat model
notes: Drop -Thinking variant; ~2-3× faster (no reasoning preamble). Already documented as recommended swap in .env.example.

notes: Add to iam-policy.json + KMS key policy. Currently falling back to GetObject (slower, more bandwidth).
